title: My Commentary for Evangelion VOXs Image of Me
display_title: My Commentary for Evangelion VOXs Image of Me
wikitext:
[]: My Commentary for Evangelion VOX's "Image of Me"             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Sep 14, 2008 5:15 pm This is an R&B song to the tune of Rei . I will address each question as Loren asks it. Look at me. What do you see? I can't see you. This is just an audio recording. Am I real or just a dream? Am I something that you see or just an image of me? You're asking if you're an image of yourself? How's that possible? If it's you talking, then it's you. And if you stare into the fire too long, is the flame as strong? Fires tend to go out after a while, but this is not significantly affected by you observing them. Or if you're lost inside a fantasy, does it end up real? No. So if you think that you're in love with me (or is it just the whole idea?), you must be sure that every single thing is what you believe in. The whole idea of what? Of you? Of love? If every drop of rain stayed in the sky, would the world just die? Yes. Everything on the land and in the sea would die. However, certain airborne bacteria could probably survive, but larger organisms would not be able to evolve as they would fall to the ground. Or Earth revolved around a different sun, would our lives have begun? For life as we know it to exist on any given planet, the planet can revolve around any sun. It just has to be the right distance from that sun. However, the probability of our individual lives coming into existence in the exact same manner as they are now is extremely infinitesimal. So if you think that you're in love with me, tell me, can you still be free? Free from what? The question is extremely vague. Also, how is this question at all relevant to your previous questions? For on the surface of most everything, something hides within. Now this statement just doesn't make sense. How can something hide within... on the surface? These questions try hard and fail to be deep and philosophical. They all end up being very easy to answer or too vague and nonsensical to merit an answer.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Sep 14, 2008 8:10 pm This amuses me. I would be interested in seeing other song lyrics similarly ridiculed.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Sep 14, 2008 8:22 pm Reichu wrote: This amuses me. I would be interested in seeing other song lyrics similarly ridiculed.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Sun Sep 14, 2008 8:23 pm This stuff almost sounds like things I would say when listening to a song with stupid lyrics. I like it!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 15, 2008 2:13 pm NAW-kun, I love it. I think it's funnier that you're answering it seriously since the questions are so vague.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Mon Sep 15, 2008 3:40 pm I want to here this song... WHERE IS IT?!?!?!?!?!?!!!!!!!1111!!11oneone!!1one

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Oct 16, 2008 1:50 am So if you think that you're in love with me, tell me, can you still be free?

[]:             Quote Post by Dramamine » Thu Oct 16, 2008 2:06 am In the end, this song just creates an awkward experience for everyone.
